nasb.text: They took therefore two chariots with horses, and the king sent after the army of the Arameans, saying, “Go and see.”

esv.text: So they took two horsemen, and the king sent them after the army of the Syrians, saying, “Go and see.”

cnv.text: 於是他們取了兩輛戰車和馬匹，王差人去追蹤亞蘭軍，吩咐他們：“去查看吧。”

ccb.text: 他们预备了两辆马车，王便命人出去追踪亚兰军、查明实情。
